pressure_statement: Agent failures labeled as provider drift, memory contamination, and evaluator disagreement are being collapsed into one noisy failure class.

lens.name: regime_fragmentation
lens.distortion_risk: May split one failure mode into too many regimes.

likely_false_positives: ordinary variance interpreted as a distinct regime
likely_false_negatives: shared causal root hidden behind different symptoms
lens_debt.overuse_failure_mode: Taxonomy expands faster than testable constraints.

candidate_claim_or_frame: These failures may be multiple regimes rather than one noisy process.
mechanism: If real, each regime should leave a different receipt signature and respond differently to replay, provider swap, and memory isolation.

rivals.frame: The pattern is a representation artifact from coarse labels.
A single verifier bug creates the apparent taxonomy.

first_wound.smallest_test: Replay three failing episodes with memory isolation and compare receipt signatures.
first_wound.what_would_hurt: All alleged regimes show the same receipt signature under replay.
first_wound.what_it_forbids: Provider drift, memory contamination, and evaluator disagreement collapsing to identical traces after isolation.

attention_request.reason: A tiny replay probe could reduce the failure zoo into separable regimes.

promotion_requirements: At least one rival is present.
